root.name: Change the background color of Slide 4 to light blue
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly changed the background color of Slide 4 to light blue, and that no undesired changes were made elsewhere.

children.name: Correct slide background color is set
children.description: Checks that Slide 4's background color is set to a light blue shade.

children.name: No undesired changes to other slides' backgrounds
children.description: Checks that no backgrounds of slides other than Slide 4 were changed.

children.name: No extraneous modifications to presentation
children.description: Checks that changes are limited to background color of Slide 4 and that no other content or metadata is modified.

children.name: No slides added or removed
children.description: Checks that no slides were added to or removed from the presentation.

children.name: No content changes on any slide
children.description: Checks that there were no changes to text, images, shapes, or other content on any slide except for the background color of Slide 4.

children.name: No animations or transitions modified
children.description: Checks that no animations or transitions were added, removed, or modified.

children.name: No extraneous visual changes to Slide 4
children.description: Checks that, apart from the background color, Slide 4's visual appearance (content, layout, etc.) remains unchanged.

metadata.task: Change the background color of Slide 4 to light blue
